title: T-018 — LP merge service
prompt:
# T-018 — LP merge service

PRD: `05-WAREHOUSE-PRD.md` §6.5 (FR-WH-003), V-WH-LP-004/005.
Project root: `/Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira`.

## Goal
Implement `mergeLps(primaryLpId, secondaryLpIds[])` Server Action accumulating qty into primary and marking secondaries 'merged'.

## Implementation contract
`apps/web/lib/services/warehouse/lp-merge.ts`. Validation: same product_id/uom/warehouse_id/(location_id unless merge_cross_location), batch_number (or both NULL), expiry within merge_expiry_tolerance_days, qa_status, status='available'. Algorithm per §6.5: primary.qty += sum(secondary.qty); primary.catch_weight_kg = sum of all (per baseline D14); secondary.status='merged'; insert lp_genealogy rows. Single transaction.

## Files (scope)
- apps/web/lib/services/warehouse/lp-merge.ts [create]
- apps/web/lib/services/warehouse/__tests__/lp-merge.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given primary qty=50 plus two secondaries qty=30 + 20, when service runs, then primary.qty=100 and both secondaries become status='merged'.
2. Given a secondary has status='reserved', when service runs, then it returns a validation error per V-WH-LP-005.
3. Given service completes, when lp_genealogy is queried, then two rows link each secondary as parent of primary with operation_type='merge'.

## Test strategy
- RED: lp-merge.test.ts covers happy/invalid/genealogy paths.
- Run `pnpm --filter web test lp-merge`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not allow reserved LPs to merge.
- Do not mix products / batches.
- Do not skip catch_weight summation.

pipeline_inputs.description: LP merge service accumulating qty into primary, marking secondaries 'merged', writing genealogy.
pipeline_inputs.details: Validation per V-WH-LP-004/005. Catch-weight sum (baseline D14). Single transaction.

Given a secondary status='reserved', when service runs, then it returns V-WH-LP-005 validation error
Given service completes, when lp_genealogy is queried, then two rows link secondaries→primary with operation_type='merge'
test_strategy: RED: lp-merge.test.ts covers happy + reserved-blocked + genealogy paths
